title: Korean Minty Tofu Wrap
description: A refreshing and flavorful wrap filled with crispy tofu, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of mint. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: 1. Cut the tofu into small cubes and pan-fry until crispy.
2. Slice the cucumber, carrots, and green chili.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the soy sauce and chopped mint leaves.
4. Add the sliced vegetables to the bowl and toss to coat.
5. Warm the wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the wrap by placing the tofu, vegetable mixture, and a sprinkle of mint leaves.
7. Fold the wrap in half and serve immediately.
